headline: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Files Debt Shelf, Is The Stock Already Fully Valued?
summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) has filed a shelf registration for debt securities, giving the industrial group added flexibility to raise capital as it balances segment shifts, efficiency initiatives, and ongoing shareholder returns. See our latest analysis for Illinois Tool Works. At a share price of US$268.81, Illinois Tool Works has posted a 7.45% 30 day share price return and a 7.74% year to date share price return. Its 5 year total shareholder return of 32.44% points to gradually building,...
